## **FIXED VALIDATION QUERY 3.2**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3.2: VALIDATE REJECT 06 (INEFFECTIVE < EFFECTIVE)
-- ============================================================

PRINT '--- 3.2: VALIDATE REJECT 06 (INEFFECTIVE < EFFECTIVE) ---';

-- Declare variables at the start
DECLARE @SelectedNDC VARCHAR(11);
DECLARE @SelectedProc VARCHAR(5);

-- Get one sample Reject 06 error
SELECT TOP 1 
    @SelectedNDC = NDC,
    @SelectedProc = Procedure_Code
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR';

PRINT 'Selected NDC: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedNDC, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Proc: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedProc, 'NULL');
PRINT '';

-- Show the rejected record from source
SELECT 
    'Source File (Rejected)' AS Source,
    File_Date,
    NDC,
    REIMB_CODE AS Procedure_Code,
    ADD_DATE AS Effective_Raw,
    RMV_DATE AS Ineffective_Raw,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) AS Ineffective_Date,
    CASE 
        WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
        THEN 'YES - Ineffective BEFORE Effective'
        ELSE 'NO'
    END AS Is_Invalid
FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = @SelectedNDC
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = @SelectedProc
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
        WHERE log.NDC = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data.NDC))
            AND log.Procedure_Code = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data.REIMB_CODE))
            AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    );

-- Verify it's NOT in production
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'CORRECT - Record NOT in production (was rejected)'
        ELSE 'ERROR - Record found in production (should have been rejected)'
    END AS Validation_Result
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = @SelectedNDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @SelectedProc;

PRINT '';
```

## **COMPLETE VALIDATION SCRIPT - ALL FIXED**

Here's the complete validation script with all variables properly declared:

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- COMPLETE PRODUCTION DATA VALIDATION - FIXED
-- ============================================================

SET NOCOUNT ON;

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'STARTING COMPLETE PRODUCTION DATA VALIDATION';
PRINT CONCAT('Run Date: ', CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120));
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 1: RECORDS WITH HISTORY
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 1: FINDING RECORDS WITH COMPLETE HISTORY';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Find NDC-Proc combinations that appear multiple times (timeline)
PRINT '--- 1.1: NDC-PROC COMBINATIONS WITH MULTIPLE ENTRIES ---';
SELECT TOP 10
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Timeline_Count,
    MIN(Effective_Date) AS First_Effective,
    MAX(Effective_Date) AS Last_Effective,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS Closed_Count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS Open_Count
FROM dbo. Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 2: UPDATED RECORDS
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 2: VALIDATING UPDATE SCENARIOS';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Find records that were updated (have log entries with ACTION_TAKEN = 'UPDATED')
PRINT '--- 2.1: RECORDS UPDATED IN NOVEMBER ---';

SELECT TOP 10
    log.File_Date,
    log.NDC,
    log.Procedure_Code,
    log. Effective_Date,
    log. Message,
    log.Action_Taken,
    -- Show current state in production
    prod. Ineffective_Date AS Current_Ineffective_Date,
    prod.NOC_Indicator AS Current_NOC,
    prod.DLU AS Last_Updated
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
INNER JOIN dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk prod ON
    log.NDC = prod. NDC
    AND log.Procedure_Code = prod.Procedure_Code
    AND log. Effective_Date = prod.Effective_Date
WHERE log.File_Date = '2025-11-01'
    AND log.Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'
ORDER BY log.NDC, log. Procedure_Code;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3: REJECTED RECORDS
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 3: VALIDATING REJECTION SCENARIOS';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Get sample of each error type
PRINT '--- 3.1: SAMPLE REJECTED RECORDS BY ERROR CODE ---';

SELECT 
    Error_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Total_Count,
    -- Sample record for each error type
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN NDC END) AS Sample_NDC,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN Procedure_Code END) AS Sample_Proc,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN Message END) AS Sample_Message
FROM (
    SELECT 
        Error_Code,
        NDC,
        Procedure_Code,
        Message,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Error_Code ORDER BY Log_ID) AS rn
    FROM dbo. NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
    WHERE Log_Type = 'ERROR'
) x
GROUP BY Error_Code
ORDER BY Error_Code;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3.2: Validate Reject 06
-- ============================================================

PRINT '--- 3.2: VALIDATE REJECT 06 (INEFFECTIVE < EFFECTIVE) ---';

-- Declare variables
DECLARE @SelectedNDC VARCHAR(11);
DECLARE @SelectedProc VARCHAR(5);

-- Get one sample Reject 06 error
SELECT TOP 1 
    @SelectedNDC = NDC,
    @SelectedProc = Procedure_Code
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR';

PRINT 'Selected NDC: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedNDC, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Proc: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedProc, 'NULL');
PRINT '';

-- Show the rejected record from source
SELECT 
    'Source File (Rejected)' AS Source,
    File_Date,
    NDC,
    REIMB_CODE AS Procedure_Code,
    ADD_DATE AS Effective_Raw,
    RMV_DATE AS Ineffective_Raw,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) AS Ineffective_Date,
    CASE 
        WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
        THEN 'YES - Ineffective BEFORE Effective'
        ELSE 'NO'
    END AS Is_Invalid
FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = @SelectedNDC
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = @SelectedProc
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
        WHERE log. NDC = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data.NDC))
            AND log.Procedure_Code = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data. REIMB_CODE))
            AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    );

-- Verify it's NOT in production
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'CORRECT - Record NOT in production (was rejected)'
        ELSE 'ERROR - Record found in production (should have been rejected)'
    END AS Validation_Result
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = @SelectedNDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @SelectedProc;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3.3: Validate Reject 13/14 (Overlaps)
-- ============================================================

PRINT '--- 3.3: VALIDATE REJECT 13/14 (OVERLAPS) ---';

-- Declare variables
DECLARE @OverlapNDC VARCHAR(11);
DECLARE @OverlapProc VARCHAR(5);
DECLARE @OverlapEff DATE;
DECLARE @OverlapFileDate DATE;

-- Get sample overlap error
SELECT TOP 1
    @OverlapNDC = NDC,
    @OverlapProc = Procedure_Code,
    @OverlapEff = Effective_Date,
    @OverlapFileDate = File_Date
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR';

PRINT 'Selected Overlap NDC: ' + ISNULL(@OverlapNDC, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Overlap Proc: ' + ISNULL(@OverlapProc, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Overlap Eff Date: ' + ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, @OverlapEff, 23), 'NULL');
PRINT '';

-- Show existing production records for this NDC-Proc
SELECT 
    'Existing Production Records' AS Source,
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    Effective_Date,
    Ineffective_Date,
    CASE 
        WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NULL THEN 'Open-ended (no end date)'
        ELSE 'Closed on ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, Ineffective_Date, 23)
    END AS Status
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = @OverlapNDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @OverlapProc
ORDER BY Effective_Date;

-- Show the rejected record from source
SELECT 
    'Rejected Record (from source)' AS Source,
    LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
    LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) AS Ineffective_Date,
    'Would have overlapped existing records' AS Status,
    File_Date
FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = @OverlapNDC
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = @OverlapProc
    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) = @OverlapEff
    AND File_Date = @OverlapFileDate;

PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: Rejected record date range overlaps with existing production record';
PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 4: SPECIFIC SCENARIOS
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 4: VALIDATING SPECIFIC SCENARIOS';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Scenario B1: Close Open Mapping (Add Ineffective Date)
PRINT '--- 4.1: SCENARIO B1 - CLOSE OPEN MAPPING ---';

SELECT TOP 5
    prod.NDC,
    prod. Procedure_Code,
    prod.Effective_Date,
    prod.Ineffective_Date,
    prod.DLU,
    CASE 
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, prod.DLU) >= '2025-12-01' THEN 'Closed in December'
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, prod.DLU) >= '2025-11-01' THEN 'Closed in November'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS When_Closed
FROM dbo. Procedure_NDC_Xwalk prod
WHERE prod.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
    AND prod.DLU >= '2025-11-01'  -- Updated in Nov or Dec
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
        WHERE log.NDC = prod.NDC
            AND log.Procedure_Code = prod.Procedure_Code
            AND log. Effective_Date = prod.Effective_Date
            AND log.Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'
            AND log.File_Date >= '2025-11-01'
    )
ORDER BY prod.DLU DESC;

PRINT '';

-- Scenario A4: Multiple Sequential Mappings
PRINT '--- 4.2: SCENARIO A4 - SEQUENTIAL TIMELINE ---';

SELECT TOP 3
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Period_Count,
    MIN(Effective_Date) AS First_Period_Start,
    MAX(ISNULL(Ineffective_Date, GETDATE())) AS Last_Period_End
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 5: COMPREHENSIVE SUMMARY
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 5: COMPREHENSIVE VALIDATION SUMMARY';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Summary of validation checks
SELECT 
    'Timeline Records (Multiple Entries)' AS Validation_Check,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code)) AS Count
FROM (
    SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code
    FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
    GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) x

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Updated Records (Nov)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-11-01'
    AND Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Updated Records (Dec)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-12-01'
    AND Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Reject 06 Errors (Total)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 06'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Reject 13/14 Errors (Overlaps)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'GROUP_REJECTION Errors',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'GROUP_REJECTION'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'CLOSED_RECORD Errors (should be 0)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'CLOSED_RECORD';

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION COMPLETE';
PRINT '============================================================';
```

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3: REJECTED RECORDS
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 3: VALIDATING REJECTION SCENARIOS';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Get sample of each error type
PRINT '--- 3.1: SAMPLE REJECTED RECORDS BY ERROR CODE ---';

SELECT 
    Error_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Total_Count,
    -- Sample record for each error type
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN NDC END) AS Sample_NDC,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN Procedure_Code END) AS Sample_Proc,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN Message END) AS Sample_Message
FROM (
    SELECT 
        Error_Code,
        NDC,
        Procedure_Code,
        Message,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Error_Code ORDER BY Log_ID) AS rn
    FROM dbo. NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
    WHERE Log_Type = 'ERROR'
) x
GROUP BY Error_Code
ORDER BY Error_Code;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3.2: Validate Reject 06
-- ============================================================

PRINT '--- 3.2: VALIDATE REJECT 06 (INEFFECTIVE < EFFECTIVE) ---';

-- Declare variables
DECLARE @SelectedNDC VARCHAR(11);
DECLARE @SelectedProc VARCHAR(5);

-- Get one sample Reject 06 error
SELECT TOP 1 
    @SelectedNDC = NDC,
    @SelectedProc = Procedure_Code
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR';

PRINT 'Selected NDC: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedNDC, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Proc: ' + ISNULL(@SelectedProc, 'NULL');
PRINT '';

-- Show the rejected record from source
SELECT 
    'Source File (Rejected)' AS Source,
    File_Date,
    NDC,
    REIMB_CODE AS Procedure_Code,
    ADD_DATE AS Effective_Raw,
    RMV_DATE AS Ineffective_Raw,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) AS Ineffective_Date,
    CASE 
        WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
        THEN 'YES - Ineffective BEFORE Effective'
        ELSE 'NO'
    END AS Is_Invalid
FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = @SelectedNDC
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = @SelectedProc
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
        WHERE log. NDC = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data.NDC))
            AND log.Procedure_Code = LTRIM(RTRIM(RJHealth_Drug_Data. REIMB_CODE))
            AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 06'
    );

-- Verify it's NOT in production
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'CORRECT - Record NOT in production (was rejected)'
        ELSE 'ERROR - Record found in production (should have been rejected)'
    END AS Validation_Result
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = @SelectedNDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @SelectedProc;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 3.3: Validate Reject 13/14 (Overlaps)
-- ============================================================

PRINT '--- 3.3: VALIDATE REJECT 13/14 (OVERLAPS) ---';

-- Declare variables
DECLARE @OverlapNDC VARCHAR(11);
DECLARE @OverlapProc VARCHAR(5);
DECLARE @OverlapEff DATE;
DECLARE @OverlapFileDate DATE;

-- Get sample overlap error
SELECT TOP 1
    @OverlapNDC = NDC,
    @OverlapProc = Procedure_Code,
    @OverlapEff = Effective_Date,
    @OverlapFileDate = File_Date
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR';

PRINT 'Selected Overlap NDC: ' + ISNULL(@OverlapNDC, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Overlap Proc: ' + ISNULL(@OverlapProc, 'NULL');
PRINT 'Selected Overlap Eff Date: ' + ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, @OverlapEff, 23), 'NULL');
PRINT '';

-- Show existing production records for this NDC-Proc
SELECT 
    'Existing Production Records' AS Source,
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    Effective_Date,
    Ineffective_Date,
    CASE 
        WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NULL THEN 'Open-ended (no end date)'
        ELSE 'Closed on ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, Ineffective_Date, 23)
    END AS Status
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = @OverlapNDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @OverlapProc
ORDER BY Effective_Date;

-- Show the rejected record from source
SELECT 
    'Rejected Record (from source)' AS Source,
    LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
    LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
    TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) AS Ineffective_Date,
    'Would have overlapped existing records' AS Status,
    File_Date
FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = @OverlapNDC
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = @OverlapProc
    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) = @OverlapEff
    AND File_Date = @OverlapFileDate;

PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: Rejected record date range overlaps with existing production record';
PRINT '';

and for this 

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 4: SPECIFIC SCENARIOS
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 4: VALIDATING SPECIFIC SCENARIOS';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Scenario B1: Close Open Mapping (Add Ineffective Date)
PRINT '--- 4.1: SCENARIO B1 - CLOSE OPEN MAPPING ---';

SELECT TOP 5
    prod.NDC,
    prod. Procedure_Code,
    prod.Effective_Date,
    prod.Ineffective_Date,
    prod.DLU,
    CASE 
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, prod.DLU) >= '2025-12-01' THEN 'Closed in December'
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, prod.DLU) >= '2025-11-01' THEN 'Closed in November'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS When_Closed
FROM dbo. Procedure_NDC_Xwalk prod
WHERE prod.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
    AND prod.DLU >= '2025-11-01'  -- Updated in Nov or Dec
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
        WHERE log.NDC = prod.NDC
            AND log.Procedure_Code = prod.Procedure_Code
            AND log. Effective_Date = prod.Effective_Date
            AND log.Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'
            AND log.File_Date >= '2025-11-01'
    )
ORDER BY prod.DLU DESC;

PRINT '';

-- Scenario A4: Multiple Sequential Mappings
PRINT '--- 4.2: SCENARIO A4 - SEQUENTIAL TIMELINE ---';

SELECT TOP 3
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Period_Count,
    MIN(Effective_Date) AS First_Period_Start,
    MAX(ISNULL(Ineffective_Date, GETDATE())) AS Last_Period_End
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

PRINT '';

-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION 5: COMPREHENSIVE SUMMARY
-- ============================================================

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION 5: COMPREHENSIVE VALIDATION SUMMARY';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Summary of validation checks
SELECT 
    'Timeline Records (Multiple Entries)' AS Validation_Check,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code)) AS Count
FROM (
    SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code
    FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
    GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) x

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Updated Records (Nov)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-11-01'
    AND Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Updated Records (Dec)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-12-01'
    AND Action_Taken = 'UPDATED'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Reject 06 Errors (Total)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 06'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Reject 13/14 Errors (Overlaps)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'GROUP_REJECTION Errors',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'GROUP_REJECTION'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'CLOSED_RECORD Errors (should be 0)',
    COUNT(*)
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE Error_Code = 'CLOSED_RECORD';

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION COMPLETE';
PRINT '============================================================';

## Copilot

**Ah! I see the issues now. BA found 2 critical bugs in our logic:**

---

## **🐛 BUG 1: Idempotent Records Should Update DLU**

### **Current Behavior (WRONG ❌):**
```
Source: All 3 months have SAME record (NDC=00338101948, Proc=J2290, Eff=2025-01-01, Ineff=2025-09-30)
Result: Only inserted in October, skipped in Nov/Dec
DLU:    Only updated in October (2026-01-22 11:23:43)
```

### **Expected Behavior (CORRECT ✅):**
```
Source: All 3 months have SAME record
Result: UPDATE in Nov and Dec (even though values unchanged)
DLU:    Should update to current processing date each month
```

**BA's Logic:**
> "If a record appears in the file, it means it's still active/current. We should UPDATE it and refresh the DLU timestamp **even if values are identical**. This tracks that we've verified this mapping in the latest file."

---

## **🐛 BUG 2: Group Rejection Incorrectly Rejecting Valid Updates**

### **Current Behavior (WRONG ❌):**

**November File:**
```
Record 1: NDC=50474075010, Proc=J0717, Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=NULL
```

**December File:**
```
Record 1: NDC=50474075010, Proc=J0717, Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=2025-11-30  ← UPDATE (add end date)
Record 2: NDC=50474075010, Proc=J0717, Eff=2025-12-01, Ineff=NULL        ← NEW (starts after old ends)
```

**What Happened:**
1. ❌ Record 2 (Eff=2025-12-01) flagged as **Reject 13/14** (overlap) - **WRONG!**
2. ❌ Because Record 2 has error → **Group Rejection** rejects Record 1 too
3. ❌ Result: **Both records rejected, NOTHING updated**

**What SHOULD Happen:**
1. ✅ Record 1 should **UPDATE** existing (add Ineff=2025-11-30)
2. ✅ Record 2 should **INSERT** new (Eff=2025-12-01)
3. ✅ No overlap because Record 1 closes on 2025-11-30, Record 2 starts 2025-12-01

---

## **🔧 ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS**

### **Bug 1 Root Cause:**
Our stored procedure has this logic:
```sql
UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
SET ...
WHERE NDC = @NDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate
    AND (
        (@NOC IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(NOC_Indicator, '') <> @NOC)
        OR (@IneffDate IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(Ineffective_Date, '1900-01-01') <> @IneffDate)
    );  ← ONLY UPDATES IF VALUES CHANGED
```

**Problem:** The `AND (... <> ...)` condition prevents update if values are identical.

---

### **Bug 2 Root Cause:**
The overlap check happens in `#WorkingData` **before** processing:
```sql
-- Overlap check runs on staging data
-- It compares NEW records against EXISTING production
-- But it doesn't account for OTHER NEW RECORDS in same batch that will UPDATE first
```

**Problem:** 
- Overlap check sees existing record (Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=NULL - open)
- New record (Eff=2025-12-01) overlaps with open-ended existing
- **BUT** another record in same batch will CLOSE the existing record first!
- Overlap check doesn't see this future state

---

## **🔧 FIXES NEEDED**

### **FIX 1: Always Update DLU (Even If Values Unchanged)**

**Change the UPDATE logic:**

```sql
-- OLD (current - wrong):
UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator),
    Ineffective_Date = ISNULL(@IneffDate, Ineffective_Date),
    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
    DLU = GETDATE()
WHERE NDC = @NDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate
    AND (  ← REMOVE THIS CONDITION
        (@NOC IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(NOC_Indicator, '') <> @NOC)
        OR (@IneffDate IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(Ineffective_Date, '1900-01-01') <> @IneffDate)
    );

-- NEW (correct):
UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator),
    Ineffective_Date = ISNULL(@IneffDate, Ineffective_Date),
    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
    DLU = GETDATE()  ← ALWAYS UPDATE DLU
WHERE NDC = @NDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
    -- NO condition - ALWAYS update to refresh DLU
```

---

### **FIX 2: Overlap Check Should Use Projected State**

**The overlap check needs to consider what WILL BE in production after all updates:**

```sql
-- Instead of checking against current production state,
-- Check against PROJECTED state after all updates in same batch

-- Step 1: Identify records that will UPDATE existing (close them)
-- Step 2: Run overlap check against production MINUS records being closed PLUS new closes
-- Step 3: Then process
```

**This is complex. Let me provide the corrected stored procedure...**

---

## **🔧 COMPLETE FIXED STORED PROCEDURE**

```sql
-- File: usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk_FIXED_v2.sql
-- Fixes:
-- 1. Always update DLU even if values unchanged
-- 2. Overlap check accounts for updates in same batch

USE DW_Reference;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk
    @FileDate DATE
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2 = GETDATE();
    DECLARE @TotalRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @UpdatedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @RejectedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @WarningRecords INT = 0;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'NDC CROSSWALK PROCESSING';
        PRINT 'File Date: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @FileDate, 23);
        PRINT 'Start Time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @StartTime, 120);
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        -- Count total records
        SELECT @TotalRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        PRINT 'Total records to process: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        IF @TotalRecords = 0
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'WARNING: No records found for this date';
            RETURN;
        END
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 2: Create temp working table with validation
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WorkingData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS NOC_Indicator,
            TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = '' THEN NULL
                ELSE TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101)
            END AS Ineffective_Date,
            File_Date,
            
            -- Validation flags
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN NDC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC))) <> 11 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) LIKE '%[^0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (non-numeric)'
                
                WHEN REIMB_CODE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE))) <> 5 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) LIKE '%[^A-Z0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (alphanumeric)'
                
                WHEN IS_NOC IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC)) <> '' 
                    AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) <> 'Y' 
                    THEN 'Reject 03: NOC INDICATOR UNKNOWN VALUE'
                
                WHEN ADD_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ADD_DATE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE MISSING'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> '' 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 05: INEFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> ''
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
                    THEN 'Reject 06: INEFFECTIVE DATE BEFORE EFFECTIVE DATE'
                
                ELSE NULL
            END AS NVARCHAR(500)) AS Validation_Error,
            
            0 AS Is_Processed
            
        INTO #WorkingData
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        -- Log field validation errors
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(ISNULL(NDC, ''), '-', ISNULL(Procedure_Code, ''), '-', ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23), '')),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            LEFT(Validation_Error, CHARINDEX(':', Validation_Error) - 1),
            Validation_Error,
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        SET @RejectedRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Field validation errors: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Check for duplicates
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 11',
            'DUPLICATE RECORDS: Key appears ' + CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) + ' times',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
        GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 11: DUPLICATE RECORDS'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM #WorkingData w2
                WHERE w2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND w2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND w2.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
                    AND w2.Validation_Error IS NULL
                GROUP BY w2.NDC, w2.Procedure_Code, w2.Effective_Date
                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
            );
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- FIX 2: IMPROVED OVERLAP CHECK
        -- Create projected state table (what production will look like after updates)
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ProjectedProduction') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
        -- Start with current production
        SELECT 
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date
        INTO #ProjectedProduction
        FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
        
        -- Apply updates from working data (simulate what will happen)
        UPDATE proj
        SET proj.Ineffective_Date = w.Ineffective_Date
        FROM #ProjectedProduction proj
        INNER JOIN #WorkingData w ON
            proj.NDC = w.NDC
            AND proj.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
            AND proj.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL;
        
        -- Now check for overlaps against PROJECTED state (not current state)
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 13/14',
            'OVERLAP: New (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ') overlaps existing (' +
                CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ')',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ProjectedProduction p ON  ← Use projected state
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
            AND w.Effective_Date <> p.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND (
                (w.Effective_Date >= p.Effective_Date 
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL 
                    AND w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Effective_Date <= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (w.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date))
            );
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 13/14: OVERLAP'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
                WHERE log.File_Date = @FileDate
                    AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
                    AND log.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND log.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND log.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
            );
        
        -- Group Rejection
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ErrorGroups') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        
        SELECT DISTINCT NDC, Procedure_Code
        INTO #ErrorGroups
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ErrorGroups eg ON w.NDC = eg.NDC AND w.Procedure_Code = eg.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL;
        
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'GROUP_REJECTION',
            'Rejected due to group rejection rule (Rule 5)',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION';
        
        DECLARE @GroupRejected INT = @@ROWCOUNT;
        SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + @GroupRejected;
        
        PRINT 'Group rejection additional errors: ' + CAST(@GroupRejected AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Total rejected records: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Warning 15
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'WARNING',
            'Warning 15',
            'RETRO RECORD: Ineffective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23) + 
                ') earlier than existing effective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ')',
            'WILL_INSERT'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date < p.Effective_Date
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p2
                WHERE p2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND p2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND (
                        (w.Effective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date 
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                        OR
                        (w.Ineffective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                    )
            );
        
        SET @WarningRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Warnings detected: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 8: Process Valid Records
        -- =====================================================
        
        PRINT 'Processing valid records...';
        
        DECLARE @NDC VARCHAR(11), @ProcCode VARCHAR(5), @NOC CHAR(1);
        DECLARE @EffDate DATE, @IneffDate DATE;
        DECLARE @ExistingIneff DATE;
        
        DECLARE process_cursor CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
            SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code, NOC_Indicator, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date
            FROM #WorkingData
            WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            ORDER BY Procedure_Code, NDC, Effective_Date;
        
        OPEN process_cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
        
        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            
            -- Check for closed record update attempt
            SET @ExistingIneff = NULL;
            
            SELECT @ExistingIneff = Ineffective_Date
            FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
            WHERE NDC = @NDC
                AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
            
            IF @ExistingIneff IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate <> @ExistingIneff
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (
                    @FileDate, 
                    CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                    @NDC, 
                    @ProcCode, 
                    @EffDate, 
                    'ERROR', 
                    'CLOSED_RECORD',
                    'ATTEMPT TO UPDATE CLOSED RECORD: Existing Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @ExistingIneff, 23) + 
                    ', New Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @IneffDate, 23),
                    'REJECTED'
                );
                
                SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + 1;
                FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
                CONTINUE;
            END
            
            -- Check if record exists
            IF EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk 
                WHERE NDC = @NDC 
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode 
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate
            )
            BEGIN
                -- =====================================================
                -- FIX 1: ALWAYS UPDATE (even if values unchanged)
                -- =====================================================
                UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
                SET 
                    NOC_Indicator = ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator),
                    Ineffective_Date = ISNULL(@IneffDate, Ineffective_Date),
                    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
                    DLU = GETDATE()  ← ALWAYS update DLU
                WHERE NDC = @NDC
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
                    -- NO condition on value changes - ALWAYS update
                
                SET @UpdatedRecords = @UpdatedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'Record updated', 'UPDATED');
            END
            ELSE
            BEGIN
                -- INSERT new record
                INSERT INTO dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk (NDC, Procedure_Code, NOC_Indicator, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date, User_ID, DLU)
                VALUES (@NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate, SYSTEM_USER, GETDATE());
                
                SET @InsertedRecords = @InsertedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'New record inserted', 'INSERTED');
            END
            
            FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
        END
        
        CLOSE process_cursor;
        DEALLOCATE process_cursor;
        
        -- Final summary
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'PROCESSING COMPLETED';
        PRINT 'Total Records: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Inserted: ' + CAST(@InsertedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Updated: ' + CAST(@UpdatedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Rejected: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Warnings: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Duration: ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR) + ' seconds';
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        SELECT 
            @FileDate AS File_Date,
            @TotalRecords AS Total_Records,
            @InsertedRecords AS Inserted,
            @UpdatedRecords AS Updated,
            @RejectedRecords AS Rejected,
            @WarningRecords AS Warnings,
            DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS Duration_Seconds;
        
        DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        PRINT 'ERROR: ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW;
    END CATCH
    
END;
GO

PRINT 'Stored procedure updated with fixes!';
GO
```

---

## **📝 SUMMARY OF FIXES**

### **Fix 1: Idempotent Update (Lines ~460-470)**
```sql
-- OLD: Only update if values changed
AND (
    (@NOC IS NOT NULL AND ... <> @NOC)
    OR (@IneffDate IS NOT NULL AND ... <> @IneffDate)
);

-- NEW: Always update to refresh DLU
-- (No condition - removes the AND clause entirely)
```

### **Fix 2: Projected State Overlap Check (Lines ~200-250)**
```sql
-- Create #ProjectedProduction table
-- Apply updates from working data first
-- Then check overlaps against PROJECTED state (not current)
```

---

**Deploy this fixed version and reprocess all 3 months.  The issues should be resolved!** 🔧

Want me to create test queries to validate the fixes?

## @arunknc0211-art

its not just DLU entire record should be updated.

## Copilot

**Ah, you're absolutely right!  BA wants the **entire record updated** (all fields refreshed), not just DLU.**

---

## **🔧 CORRECTED FIX: Always UPDATE All Fields**

### **Current Logic (WRONG ❌):**
```sql
UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator),      ← Only update if @NOC has value
    Ineffective_Date = ISNULL(@IneffDate, Ineffective_Date),  ← Only update if @IneffDate has value
    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
    DLU = GETDATE()
WHERE ...
```

**Problem:** `ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator)` means "keep existing value if @NOC is NULL". This doesn't actually update the field.

---

### **Correct Logic (RIGHT ✅):**
```sql
UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = @NOC,           ← ALWAYS set to source value (even if NULL)
    Ineffective_Date = @IneffDate,  ← ALWAYS set to source value (even if NULL)
    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
    DLU = GETDATE()
WHERE NDC = @NDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
    -- NO condition - ALWAYS update entire record
```

**This ensures:**
- ✅ Every field is refreshed from source file
- ✅ DLU always updated
- ✅ Even if values are identical, the UPDATE still executes
- ✅ `@@ROWCOUNT` will be > 0 and record is logged as UPDATED

---

## **🔧 COMPLETE CORRECTED STORED PROCEDURE**

Here's the complete fixed version with the correct UPDATE logic:

```sql
-- File: usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk_FINAL_CORRECTED.sql
-- Fixes:
-- 1. ALWAYS update entire record (all fields) even if values unchanged
-- 2. Overlap check uses projected state (accounts for updates in same batch)

USE DW_Reference;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk
    @FileDate DATE
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2 = GETDATE();
    DECLARE @TotalRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @UpdatedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @RejectedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @WarningRecords INT = 0;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'NDC CROSSWALK PROCESSING';
        PRINT 'File Date: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @FileDate, 23);
        PRINT 'Start Time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @StartTime, 120);
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        -- Count total records
        SELECT @TotalRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        PRINT 'Total records to process: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        IF @TotalRecords = 0
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'WARNING: No records found for this date';
            RETURN;
        END
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 2: Create temp working table with validation
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WorkingData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS NOC_Indicator,
            TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = '' THEN NULL
                ELSE TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101)
            END AS Ineffective_Date,
            File_Date,
            
            -- Validation flags
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN NDC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC))) <> 11 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) LIKE '%[^0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (non-numeric)'
                
                WHEN REIMB_CODE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE))) <> 5 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) LIKE '%[^A-Z0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (alphanumeric)'
                
                WHEN IS_NOC IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC)) <> '' 
                    AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) <> 'Y' 
                    THEN 'Reject 03: NOC INDICATOR UNKNOWN VALUE'
                
                WHEN ADD_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ADD_DATE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE MISSING'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> '' 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 05: INEFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> ''
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
                    THEN 'Reject 06: INEFFECTIVE DATE BEFORE EFFECTIVE DATE'
                
                ELSE NULL
            END AS NVARCHAR(500)) AS Validation_Error,
            
            0 AS Is_Processed
            
        INTO #WorkingData
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        -- Log field validation errors
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(ISNULL(NDC, ''), '-', ISNULL(Procedure_Code, ''), '-', ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23), '')),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            LEFT(Validation_Error, CHARINDEX(':', Validation_Error) - 1),
            Validation_Error,
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        SET @RejectedRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Field validation errors: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Check for duplicates
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 11',
            'DUPLICATE RECORDS: Key appears ' + CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) + ' times',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
        GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 11: DUPLICATE RECORDS'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM #WorkingData w2
                WHERE w2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND w2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND w2.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
                    AND w2.Validation_Error IS NULL
                GROUP BY w2.NDC, w2.Procedure_Code, w2.Effective_Date
                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
            );
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- FIX 2: IMPROVED OVERLAP CHECK - Use Projected State
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ProjectedProduction') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
        -- Start with current production
        SELECT 
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date
        INTO #ProjectedProduction
        FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
        
        -- Apply updates from working data to create projected state
        UPDATE proj
        SET proj.Ineffective_Date = w.Ineffective_Date,
            proj.NOC_Indicator = w.NOC_Indicator  -- Also project NOC changes
        FROM #ProjectedProduction proj
        INNER JOIN #WorkingData w ON
            proj.NDC = w.NDC
            AND proj.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
            AND proj.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL;
        
        -- Check overlaps against PROJECTED state
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 13/14',
            'OVERLAP: New (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ') overlaps existing (' +
                CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ')',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ProjectedProduction p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
            AND w.Effective_Date <> p.Effective_Date  -- Different effective dates
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND (
                -- New starts during existing period
                (w.Effective_Date >= p.Effective_Date 
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                -- New ends during existing period
                (w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL 
                    AND w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                -- New encompasses existing
                (w.Effective_Date <= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (w.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date))
            );
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 13/14: OVERLAP'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
                WHERE log.File_Date = @FileDate
                    AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
                    AND log.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND log.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND log.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
            );
        
        -- Group Rejection (Rule 5)
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ErrorGroups') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        
        SELECT DISTINCT NDC, Procedure_Code
        INTO #ErrorGroups
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ErrorGroups eg ON w.NDC = eg.NDC AND w.Procedure_Code = eg.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL;
        
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'GROUP_REJECTION',
            'Rejected due to group rejection rule (Rule 5)',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION';
        
        DECLARE @GroupRejected INT = @@ROWCOUNT;
        SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + @GroupRejected;
        
        PRINT 'Group rejection additional errors: ' + CAST(@GroupRejected AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Total rejected records: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Warning 15 - Retro Records
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'WARNING',
            'Warning 15',
            'RETRO RECORD: Ineffective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23) + 
                ') earlier than existing effective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ')',
            'WILL_INSERT'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date < p.Effective_Date
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p2
                WHERE p2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND p2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND (
                        (w.Effective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date 
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                        OR
                        (w.Ineffective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                    )
            );
        
        SET @WarningRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Warnings detected: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 8: Process Valid Records
        -- =====================================================
        
        PRINT 'Processing valid records...';
        
        DECLARE @NDC VARCHAR(11), @ProcCode VARCHAR(5), @NOC CHAR(1);
        DECLARE @EffDate DATE, @IneffDate DATE;
        DECLARE @ExistingIneff DATE;
        
        DECLARE process_cursor CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
            SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code, NOC_Indicator, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date
            FROM #WorkingData
            WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            ORDER BY Procedure_Code, NDC, Effective_Date;  -- Rule 4: Oldest first
        
        OPEN process_cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
        
        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            
            -- =====================================================
            -- Check for CLOSED RECORD update attempt
            -- =====================================================
            SET @ExistingIneff = NULL;
            
            SELECT @ExistingIneff = Ineffective_Date
            FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
            WHERE NDC = @NDC
                AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
            
            IF @ExistingIneff IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate <> @ExistingIneff
            BEGIN
                -- Log error: Trying to change existing ineffective date
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (
                    @FileDate, 
                    CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                    @NDC, 
                    @ProcCode, 
                    @EffDate, 
                    'ERROR', 
                    'CLOSED_RECORD',
                    'ATTEMPT TO UPDATE CLOSED RECORD: Existing Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @ExistingIneff, 23) + 
                    ', New Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @IneffDate, 23),
                    'REJECTED'
                );
                
                SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + 1;
                FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
                CONTINUE;
            END
            
            -- =====================================================
            -- Check if record exists
            -- =====================================================
            IF EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk 
                WHERE NDC = @NDC 
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode 
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate
            )
            BEGIN
                -- =====================================================
                -- FIX 1: ALWAYS UPDATE ALL FIELDS (no ISNULL logic)
                -- =====================================================
                UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
                SET 
                    NOC_Indicator = @NOC,           -- ← ALWAYS set from source (even if NULL)
                    Ineffective_Date = @IneffDate,  -- ← ALWAYS set from source (even if NULL)
                    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
                    DLU = GETDATE()
                WHERE NDC = @NDC
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
                    -- NO condition - ALWAYS execute UPDATE
                
                SET @UpdatedRecords = @UpdatedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'Record updated', 'UPDATED');
            END
            ELSE
            BEGIN
                -- INSERT new record
                INSERT INTO dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk (NDC, Procedure_Code, NOC_Indicator, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date, User_ID, DLU)
                VALUES (@NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate, SYSTEM_USER, GETDATE());
                
                SET @InsertedRecords = @InsertedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'New record inserted', 'INSERTED');
            END
            
            FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO @NDC, @ProcCode, @NOC, @EffDate, @IneffDate;
        END
        
        CLOSE process_cursor;
        DEALLOCATE process_cursor;
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- FINAL SUMMARY
        -- =====================================================
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'PROCESSING COMPLETED';
        PRINT 'Total Records: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Inserted: ' + CAST(@InsertedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Updated: ' + CAST(@UpdatedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Rejected: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Warnings: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Duration: ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR) + ' seconds';
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        SELECT 
            @FileDate AS File_Date,
            @TotalRecords AS Total_Records,
            @InsertedRecords AS Inserted,
            @UpdatedRecords AS Updated,
            @RejectedRecords AS Rejected,
            @WarningRecords AS Warnings,
            DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS Duration_Seconds;
        
        -- Cleanup
        DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        PRINT 'ERROR: ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW;
    END CATCH
    
END;
GO

PRINT 'Stored procedure updated with correct fixes!';
PRINT '';
PRINT 'Key Changes:';
PRINT '1. UPDATE always executes and refreshes ALL fields (no ISNULL logic)';
PRINT '2. Overlap check uses projected state (accounts for updates in same batch)';
GO
```

---

## **📝 KEY CHANGES SUMMARY**

### **Fix 1: Always Update All Fields (Lines ~420-435)**

**BEFORE (Wrong):**
```sql
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = ISNULL(@NOC, NOC_Indicator),      ← Keeps old value if @NOC is NULL
    Ineffective_Date = ISNULL(@IneffDate, Ineffective_Date),  ← Keeps old value if @IneffDate is NULL
    ...
WHERE ...
    AND (  ← Only update if values changed
        (@NOC IS NOT NULL AND ... <> @NOC)
        OR (@IneffDate IS NOT NULL AND ... <> @IneffDate)
    );
```

**AFTER (Correct):**
```sql
SET 
    NOC_Indicator = @NOC,           ← ALWAYS set from source (even NULL)
    Ineffective_Date = @IneffDate,  ← ALWAYS set from source (even NULL)
    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
    DLU = GETDATE()
WHERE NDC = @NDC
    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
    -- NO condition - ALWAYS executes
```

### **Fix 2: Projected State for Overlap Check (Lines ~200-250)**
- Creates `#ProjectedProduction` table
- Applies updates from current batch first
- Then checks overlaps against **future state** (not current state)

---

## **✅ EXPECTED BEHAVIOR AFTER FIX**

### **Example 1: NDC 00338101948, Proc J2290**

**Before Fix:**
```
Oct file: INSERT (DLU = 2026-01-22 11:23:43)
Nov file: SKIPPED (no update, same values)
Dec file: SKIPPED (no update, same values)

Production DLU: 2026-01-22 11:23:43 (never updated)
Log: Only 1 INSERT entry
```

**After Fix:**
```
Oct file: INSERT (DLU = 2026-01-22 11:23:43)
Nov file: UPDATE (DLU = 2026-01-22 11:39:00) ← DLU refreshed
Dec file: UPDATE (DLU = 2026-01-22 11:43:00) ← DLU refreshed

Production DLU: 2026-01-22 11:43:00 (latest)
Log: 1 INSERT + 2 UPDATED entries
```

---

### **Example 2: NDC 50474075010, Proc J0717**

**Before Fix:**
```
Dec file has 2 records:
  Record 1: Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=2025-11-30 (close existing)
  Record 2: Eff=2025-12-01, Ineff=NULL (new)

Result: 
  - Record 2 flagged as overlap (checks against open-ended existing)
  - GROUP_REJECTION rejects both records
  - NOTHING processed ❌
```

**After Fix:**
```
Dec file has 2 records:
  Record 1: Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=2025-11-30
  Record 2: Eff=2025-12-01, Ineff=NULL

Projected State Check:
  - Apply Record 1 update first (close existing at 2025-11-30)
  - Check Record 2 against CLOSED existing (ends 2025-11-30)
  - No overlap! (Record 2 starts 2025-12-01)

Result:
  - Record 1: UPDATED ✅
  - Record 2: INSERTED ✅
```

The two issues should now be completely fixed.

```sql
TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log;

-- Verify empty
SELECT 'Production Table' AS Table_Name, COUNT(*) AS Row_Count FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk

SELECT 'Log Table', COUNT(*) FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log;
```

### **STEP 5: Validate the Two Bug Fixes**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- VALIDATION: VERIFY BUG FIXES
-- ============================================================

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATING BUG FIXES';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- BUG FIX 1: Idempotent Records Should Update DLU
-- =====================================================

PRINT '--- BUG FIX 1: VERIFY IDEMPOTENT UPDATES ---';

-- Check NDC 00338101948, Proc J2290
SELECT 
    'Bug Fix 1 - Idempotent Update' AS Test,
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    Effective_Date,
    Ineffective_Date,
    DLU,
    CASE 
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, DLU) >= '2025-12-01' THEN 'Updated in December ✅'
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, DLU) >= '2025-11-01' THEN 'Updated in November (NOT December) ❌'
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, DLU) >= '2025-10-01' THEN 'Never updated after October ❌'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS DLU_Status
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '00338101948'
    AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290';

-- Check log entries for this record
SELECT 
    File_Date,
    Action_Taken,
    Message,
    Created_Date
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '00338101948'
    AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290'
ORDER BY File_Date;

PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: DLU should be from December processing';
PRINT 'Expected: 3 log entries (1 INSERT in Oct, 1 UPDATE in Nov, 1 UPDATE in Dec)';
PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- BUG FIX 2: Group Rejection Fixed (Projected State)
-- =====================================================

PRINT '--- BUG FIX 2: VERIFY PROJECTED STATE OVERLAP CHECK ---';

-- Check NDC 50474075010, Proc J0717
SELECT 
    'Bug Fix 2 - Production Records' AS Test,
    NDC,
    Procedure_Code,
    Effective_Date,
    Ineffective_Date,
    DLU
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '50474075010'
    AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY Effective_Date;

-- Check log entries
SELECT 
    'Bug Fix 2 - Log Entries' AS Test,
    File_Date,
    Effective_Date,
    Action_Taken,
    Error_Code,
    Message
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '50474075010'
    AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY File_Date, Effective_Date;

PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: 2 records in production:';
PRINT '  1. Eff=2024-09-17, Ineff=2025-11-30 (closed in Dec)';
PRINT '  2. Eff=2025-12-01, Ineff=NULL (inserted in Dec)';
PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: NO Reject 13/14 or GROUP_REJECTION errors in December';
PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- OVERALL VALIDATION
-- =====================================================

PRINT '--- OVERALL VALIDATION SUMMARY ---';

SELECT 
    File_Date,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'INSERTED' THEN 1 END) AS Inserted,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'UPDATED' THEN 1 END) AS Updated,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 END) AS Rejected
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
GROUP BY File_Date
ORDER BY File_Date;

PRINT '';
PRINT 'Expected: November and December should have HIGH UPDATE counts (~232K each)';
PRINT '';

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION COMPLETE';
PRINT '============================================================';
```

---

## **📋 COMPLETE REPROCESSING SCRIPT**

**Run this all at once:**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- COMPLETE REPROCESSING WITH BUG FIXES
-- ============================================================

SET NOCOUNT ON;

PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'STARTING COMPLETE REPROCESSING WITH BUG FIXES';
PRINT CONCAT('Start Time: ', CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120));
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- STEP 1: Clean up
TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log;
PRINT 'Tables cleaned';
PRINT '';

-- STEP 2: October
PRINT '--- PROCESSING OCTOBER ---';
EXEC dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk @FileDate = '2025-10-01';
PRINT '';

-- STEP 3: November
PRINT '--- PROCESSING NOVEMBER ---';
EXEC dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk @FileDate = '2025-11-01';
PRINT '';

-- STEP 4: December
PRINT '--- PROCESSING DECEMBER ---';
EXEC dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk @FileDate = '2025-12-01';
PRINT '';

-- STEP 5: Validate Bug Fixes
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATING BUG FIXES';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Bug Fix 1: Idempotent Update
PRINT '--- BUG FIX 1: IDEMPOTENT UPDATE ---';
SELECT 
    NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date, DLU,
    CASE 
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, DLU) >= '2025-12-01' THEN 'December ✅'
        WHEN CONVERT(DATE, DLU) >= '2025-11-01' THEN 'November ❌'
        ELSE 'October ❌'
    END AS Last_Updated
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '00338101948' AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290';

SELECT File_Date, Action_Taken, Created_Date
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '00338101948' AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290'
ORDER BY File_Date;

PRINT '';

-- Bug Fix 2: Projected State
PRINT '--- BUG FIX 2: PROJECTED STATE OVERLAP ---';
SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '50474075010' AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY Effective_Date;

SELECT File_Date, Effective_Date, Action_Taken, Error_Code
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '50474075010' AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY File_Date, Effective_Date;

PRINT '';

-- Overall Summary
PRINT '--- MONTHLY SUMMARY ---';
SELECT 
    File_Date,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'INSERTED' THEN 1 END) AS Inserted,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'UPDATED' THEN 1 END) AS Updated,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 END) AS Rejected
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
GROUP BY File_Date
ORDER BY File_Date;

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'REPROCESSING AND VALIDATION COMPLETE';
PRINT CONCAT('End Time: ', CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120));
PRINT '============================================================';
```

Start Time: 2026-01-22 17:06:25
