```sql
-- ============================================================
-- STORED PROCEDURE (Works with your existing table structure)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk
    @FileDate DATE
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2 = GETDATE();
    DECLARE @TotalRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @ExcludedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @UpdatedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @RejectedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @WarningRecords INT = 0;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'NDC CROSSWALK PROCESSING';
        PRINT 'File Date: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @FileDate, 23);
        PRINT 'Start Time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @StartTime, 120);
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        -- Count total records
        SELECT @TotalRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        PRINT 'Total records in file: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Count excluded records (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01)
        SELECT @ExcludedRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate
            AND RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL
            AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> ''
            AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < '2014-01-01';
        
        PRINT 'Excluded records (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01): ' + CAST(@ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Records to process: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        IF (@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords) = 0
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'WARNING: No records to process after exclusions';
            RETURN;
        END
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- Create temp working table with ALL SOURCE FIELDS
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WorkingData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(DRUG_NAME)) AS DRUG_NAME,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(RC_DESC)) AS RC_DESC,
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS NOC_Indicator,
            TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = '' THEN NULL
                ELSE TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101)
            END AS Ineffective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_SIZE IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_SIZE) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_SIZE AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_SIZE,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_QTY IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_QTY) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_QTY AS INT)
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_QTY,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(UOM)) AS UOM,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(PKG_UOM)) AS PKG_UOM,
            File_Date,
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN NDC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC))) <> 11 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) LIKE '%[

## Copilot

**You're absolutely right! Column order matters for readability and maintenance. Let's drop and recreate with proper order.**

---

## **🔧 COMPLETE FRESH START - DROP AND RECREATE BOTH TABLES**

### **SCRIPT 1: DROP AND CREATE PROCEDURE_NDC_XWALK TABLE**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- DROP AND CREATE PROCEDURE_NDC_XWALK TABLE (PROPER ORDER)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

-- Drop existing table
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    PRINT 'Dropping existing Procedure_NDC_Xwalk table...';
    DROP TABLE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
    PRINT 'Table dropped';
END
GO

PRINT 'Creating Procedure_NDC_Xwalk table with proper column order...';

CREATE TABLE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk (
    -- Primary Key
    Xwalk_ID INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Core identification fields (in logical order)
    NDC VARCHAR(11) NOT NULL,
    DRUG_NAME VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    Procedure_Code VARCHAR(5) NOT NULL,
    RC_DESC VARCHAR(512) NULL,
    NOC_Indicator CHAR(1) NULL,
    
    -- Date fields (key matching fields)
    Effective_Date DATE NOT NULL,
    Ineffective_Date DATE NULL,
    
    -- Billing/Package fields (grouped together)
    BILL_UNITS DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    PKG_SIZE DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    PKG_QTY INT NULL,
    UOM VARCHAR(10) NULL,
    PKG_UOM VARCHAR(20) NULL,
    
    -- Audit fields (at the end)
    User_ID VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT (SUSER_SNAME()),
    File_Date DATE NULL,
    DLU DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
    
    -- Constraints
    CONSTRAINT PK_Procedure_NDC_Xwalk PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED (Xwalk_ID),
    CONSTRAINT UQ_NDC_Proc_EffDate UNIQUE (NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date),
    CONSTRAINT CK_NOC CHECK (NOC_Indicator IS NULL OR NOC_Indicator = 'Y')
);

PRINT 'Procedure_NDC_Xwalk table created successfully!';
PRINT '';

-- Verify column order
SELECT 
    ORDINAL_POSITION AS Col_Order,
    COLUMN_NAME,
    DATA_TYPE + 
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NOT NULL 
        THEN '(' + CAST(CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        WHEN NUMERIC_PRECISION IS NOT NULL
        THEN '(' + CAST(NUMERIC_PRECISION AS VARCHAR) + ',' + CAST(NUMERIC_SCALE AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        ELSE ''
    END AS Data_Type,
    IS_NULLABLE,
    COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Procedure_NDC_Xwalk'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

GO
```

---

### **SCRIPT 2: DROP AND CREATE NDC_XWALK_PROCESS_LOG TABLE**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- DROP AND CREATE NDC_XWALK_PROCESS_LOG TABLE

USE DW_Reference;

BEGIN
    PRINT 'Dropping existing NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table...';
    DROP TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log;
    PRINT 'Log table dropped';
END
GO

PRINT 'Creating NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table...';

CREATE TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
    -- Primary Key
    Log_ID INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- File processing info
    File_Date DATE NOT NULL,
    Process_Date DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
    
    -- Record identification
    Record_Key VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    NDC VARCHAR(11) NULL,
    Procedure_Code VARCHAR(5) NULL,
    Effective_Date DATE NULL,
    
    -- Log details
    Log_Type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    Error_Code VARCHAR(20) NULL,
    Message NVARCHAR(1000) NULL,
    Action_Taken VARCHAR(50) NULL,
    
    -- Audit
    Created_Date DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
    
    -- Constraints
    CONSTRAINT PK_NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED (Log_ID)
);

PRINT 'NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table created successfully!';
PRINT '';

-- Verify column order
SELECT 
    ORDINAL_POSITION AS Col_Order,
    COLUMN_NAME,
    DATA_TYPE + 
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NOT NULL 
        THEN '(' + CAST(CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        ELSE ''
    END AS Data_Type,
    IS_NULLABLE,
    COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

GO

---

### **SCRIPT 3: COMPLETE STORED PROCEDURE (NO INDEXES VERSION)**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- CREATE STORED PROCEDURE (COMPLETE - NO INDEXES)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk
    @FileDate DATE
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2 = GETDATE();
    DECLARE @TotalRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @ExcludedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @UpdatedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @RejectedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @WarningRecords INT = 0;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'NDC CROSSWALK PROCESSING';
        PRINT 'File Date: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @FileDate, 23);
        PRINT 'Start Time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @StartTime, 120);
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        -- Count total records
        SELECT @TotalRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        PRINT 'Total records in file: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Count excluded records (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01)
        SELECT @ExcludedRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate
            AND RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL
            AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> ''
            AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < '2014-01-01';
        
        PRINT 'Excluded records (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01): ' + CAST(@ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Records to process: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        IF (@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords) = 0
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'WARNING: No records to process after exclusions';
            RETURN;
        END
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 2: Create temp working table with ALL SOURCE FIELDS
        -- =====================================================
        
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WorkingData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(DRUG_NAME)) AS DRUG_NAME,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(RC_DESC)) AS RC_DESC,
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS NOC_Indicator,
            TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = '' THEN NULL
                ELSE TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101)
            END AS Ineffective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_SIZE IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_SIZE) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_SIZE AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_SIZE,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_QTY IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_QTY) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_QTY AS INT)
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_QTY,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(UOM)) AS UOM,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(PKG_UOM)) AS PKG_UOM,
            File_Date,
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN NDC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC))) <> 11 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) LIKE '%[^0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (non-numeric)'
                WHEN REIMB_CODE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE))) <> 5 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) LIKE '%[^A-Z0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (alphanumeric)'
                WHEN IS_NOC IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC)) <> '' 
                    AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) <> 'Y' 
                    THEN 'Reject 03: NOC INDICATOR UNKNOWN VALUE'
                WHEN ADD_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ADD_DATE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE MISSING'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> '' 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 05: INEFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
                    THEN 'Reject 06: INEFFECTIVE DATE BEFORE EFFECTIVE DATE'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS NVARCHAR(500)) AS Validation_Error,
            0 AS Is_Processed
        INTO #WorkingData
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate
            AND (
                RMV_DATE IS NULL 
                OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = ''
                OR TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL
                OR TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) >= '2014-01-01'
            );
        
        DECLARE @WorkingCount INT = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #WorkingData);
        PRINT 'Working data loaded: ' + CAST(@WorkingCount AS VARCHAR) + ' records';
        
        -- Field validation errors
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(ISNULL(NDC, ''), '-', ISNULL(Procedure_Code, ''), '-', ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23), '')),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            LEFT(Validation_Error, CHARINDEX(':', Validation_Error) - 1),
            Validation_Error,
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        SET @RejectedRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Field validation errors: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Check for duplicates
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 11',
            'DUPLICATE RECORDS: Key appears ' + CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) + ' times',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
        GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 11: DUPLICATE RECORDS'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM #WorkingData w2
                WHERE w2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND w2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND w2.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
                    AND w2.Validation_Error IS NULL
                GROUP BY w2.NDC, w2.Procedure_Code, w2.Effective_Date
                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
            );
        
        -- Projected state for overlap check
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ProjectedProduction') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
        SELECT 
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date
        INTO #ProjectedProduction
        FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
        
        UPDATE proj
        SET proj.Ineffective_Date = w.Ineffective_Date
        FROM #ProjectedProduction proj
        INNER JOIN #WorkingData w ON
            proj.NDC = w.NDC
            AND proj.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
            AND proj.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL;
        
        -- Check overlaps
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 13/14',
            'OVERLAP: New (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ') overlaps existing (' +
                CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ')',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ProjectedProduction p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
            AND w.Effective_Date <> p.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND (
                (w.Effective_Date >= p.Effective_Date 
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL 
                    AND w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Effective_Date <= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (w.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date))
            );
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 13/14: OVERLAP'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
                WHERE log.File_Date = @FileDate
                    AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
                    AND log.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND log.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND log.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
            );
        
        -- Group Rejection
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ErrorGroups') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        
        SELECT DISTINCT NDC, Procedure_Code
        INTO #ErrorGroups
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ErrorGroups eg ON w.NDC = eg.NDC AND w.Procedure_Code = eg.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL;
        
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(NDC, '-', Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, Effective_Date, 23)),
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'GROUP_REJECTION',
            'Rejected due to group rejection rule (Rule 5)',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION';
        
        DECLARE @GroupRejected INT = @@ROWCOUNT;
        SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + @GroupRejected;
        
        PRINT 'Group rejection additional errors: ' + CAST(@GroupRejected AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Total rejected records: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Warning 15
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                 Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            CONCAT(w.NDC, '-', w.Procedure_Code, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23)),
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            'WARNING',
            'Warning 15',
            'RETRO RECORD: Ineffective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23) + 
                ') earlier than existing effective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ')',
            'WILL_INSERT'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date < p.Effective_Date
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p2
                WHERE p2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND p2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND (
                        (w.Effective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date 
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                        OR
                        (w.Ineffective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                    )
            );
        
        SET @WarningRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Warnings detected: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- =====================================================
        -- STEP 8: Process Valid Records with ALL FIELDS
        -- =====================================================
        
        PRINT 'Processing valid records...';
        
        DECLARE @NDC VARCHAR(11), @ProcCode VARCHAR(5), @NOC CHAR(1);
        DECLARE @DrugName VARCHAR(255), @RCDesc VARCHAR(512);
        DECLARE @EffDate DATE, @IneffDate DATE;
        DECLARE @BillUnits DECIMAL(12,6), @BillUnitsPkg DECIMAL(12,6);
        DECLARE @PkgSize DECIMAL(12,6), @PkgQty INT;
        DECLARE @UOM VARCHAR(10), @PkgUOM VARCHAR(20);
        DECLARE @FileDate_Value DATE;
        DECLARE @ExistingIneff DATE;
        
        DECLARE process_cursor CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
            SELECT 
                NDC, DRUG_NAME, Procedure_Code, RC_DESC, NOC_Indicator, 
                Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
                BILL_UNITS, BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG, PKG_SIZE, PKG_QTY,
                UOM, PKG_UOM, File_Date
            FROM #WorkingData
            WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            ORDER BY Procedure_Code, NDC, Effective_Date;
        
        OPEN process_cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO 
            @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
            @EffDate, @IneffDate,
            @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
            @UOM, @PkgUOM, @FileDate_Value;
        
        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            
            SET @ExistingIneff = NULL;
            
            SELECT @ExistingIneff = Ineffective_Date
            FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
            WHERE NDC = @NDC
                AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
            
            IF @ExistingIneff IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate <> @ExistingIneff
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (
                    @FileDate, 
                    CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                    @NDC, 
                    @ProcCode, 
                    @EffDate, 
                    'ERROR', 
                    'CLOSED_RECORD',
                    'ATTEMPT TO UPDATE CLOSED RECORD: Existing Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @ExistingIneff, 23) + 
                    ', New Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @IneffDate, 23),
                    'REJECTED'
                );
                
                SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + 1;
                FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO 
                    @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
                    @EffDate, @IneffDate,
                    @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
                    @UOM, @PkgUOM, @FileDate_Value;
                CONTINUE;
            END
            
            IF EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk 
                WHERE NDC = @NDC 
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode 
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate
            )
            BEGIN
                -- UPDATE with ALL FIELDS
                UPDATE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
                SET 
                    DRUG_NAME = @DrugName,
                    RC_DESC = @RCDesc,
                    NOC_Indicator = @NOC,
                    Ineffective_Date = @IneffDate,
                    BILL_UNITS = @BillUnits,
                    BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG = @BillUnitsPkg,
                    PKG_SIZE = @PkgSize,
                    PKG_QTY = @PkgQty,
                    UOM = @UOM,
                    PKG_UOM = @PkgUOM,
                    User_ID = SYSTEM_USER,
                    DLU = GETDATE(),
                    File_Date = @FileDate_Value
                WHERE NDC = @NDC
                    AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                    AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
                
                SET @UpdatedRecords = @UpdatedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'Record updated', 'UPDATED');
            END
            ELSE
            BEGIN
                -- INSERT with ALL FIELDS
                INSERT INTO dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk (
                    NDC, DRUG_NAME, Procedure_Code, RC_DESC, NOC_Indicator, 
                    Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
                    BILL_UNITS, BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG, PKG_SIZE, PKG_QTY,
                    UOM, PKG_UOM,
                    User_ID, DLU, File_Date
                )
                VALUES (
                    @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
                    @EffDate, @IneffDate,
                    @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
                    @UOM, @PkgUOM,
                    SYSTEM_USER, GETDATE(), @FileDate_Value
                );
                
                SET @InsertedRecords = @InsertedRecords + 1;
                
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (File_Date, Record_Key, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, 
                                                         Log_Type, Message, Action_Taken)
                VALUES (@FileDate, CONCAT(@NDC, '-', @ProcCode, '-', CONVERT(VARCHAR, @EffDate, 23)),
                        @NDC, @ProcCode, @EffDate, 'INFO', 'New record inserted', 'INSERTED');
            END
            
            FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO 
                @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
                @EffDate, @IneffDate,
                @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
                @UOM, @PkgUOM, @FileDate_Value;
        END
        
        CLOSE process_cursor;
        DEALLOCATE process_cursor;
        
        -- Final summary
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'PROCESSING COMPLETED';
        PRINT 'Total Records in File: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Excluded (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01): ' + CAST(@ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Processed: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Inserted: ' + CAST(@InsertedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Updated: ' + CAST(@UpdatedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Rejected: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Warnings: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Duration: ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR) + ' seconds';
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        SELECT 
            @FileDate AS File_Date,
            @TotalRecords AS Total_Records_In_File,
            @ExcludedRecords AS Excluded_Pre2014,
            @InsertedRecords AS Inserted,
            @UpdatedRecords AS Updated,
            @RejectedRecords AS Rejected,
            @WarningRecords AS Warnings,
            DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StartTime, GETDATE()) AS Duration_Seconds;
        
        DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        PRINT 'ERROR: ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW;
    END CATCH
    
END;
GO

PRINT 'Stored procedure created successfully!';
PRINT 'Ready to process NDC crosswalk files!';
GO
```

---

2. Run Script 2 (Create NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table)
3. Run Script 3 (Create stored procedure)
4. Test with one month
5. Process all months

**These scripts create clean tables with proper column order and no extra indexes!** 🚀

    'After October' AS Status,
    COUNT(*) AS Total_Records,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS Active_Records,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS Closed_Records,

FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY Action_Taken
ORDER BY Action_Taken;

SELECT 
    Error_Code,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE File_Date = '2025-10-01'
    AND Log_Type = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY Error_Code
ORDER BY Error_Code;
```

### **STEP 4: Process December**

```sql
-- ============================================================

-- Final verification
SELECT 
    'After December' AS Status,
    COUNT(*) AS Total_Records,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN File_Date = '2025-10-01' THEN 1 END) AS From_October,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN File_Date = '2025-11-01' THEN 1 END) AS From_November,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN File_Date = '2025-12-01' THEN 1 END) AS From_December
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;

-- Monthly summary
SELECT 
    File_Date,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'INSERTED' THEN 1 END) AS Inserted,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'UPDATED' THEN 1 END) AS Updated,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Action_Taken = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 END) AS Rejected
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
GROUP BY File_Date
ORDER BY File_Date;

```

### **STEP 5: Validate Bug Fixes (Final Verification)**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- FINAL VALIDATION: VERIFY BUG FIXES
-- ============================================================

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'FINAL VALIDATION: BUG FIXES';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT '';

-- Bug Fix 1: Idempotent Update (NDC 00338101948)
PRINT '--- BUG FIX 1: IDEMPOTENT UPDATE ---';
SELECT 
    NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
    File_Date, DLU,
    CASE 
        WHEN File_Date = '2025-12-01' THEN 'Updated in December ✅'
        WHEN File_Date = '2025-11-01' THEN 'Updated in November ❌'
        ELSE 'Updated in October ❌'
    END AS Last_File_Processed
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '00338101948' AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290';

SELECT File_Date, Action_Taken, Created_Date
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '00338101948' AND Procedure_Code = 'J2290'
ORDER BY File_Date;

PRINT '';

-- Bug Fix 2: Sequential Records (NDC 50474075010)
PRINT '--- BUG FIX 2: SEQUENTIAL RECORDS ---';
SELECT NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date, File_Date
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
WHERE NDC = '50474075010' AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY Effective_Date;

SELECT File_Date, Effective_Date, Action_Taken, Error_Code
FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log
WHERE NDC = '50474075010' AND Procedure_Code = 'J0717'
ORDER BY File_Date, Effective_Date;

PRINT '';

-- Verify all new fields populated
PRINT '--- VERIFY ALL FIELDS POPULATED ---';
SELECT TOP 5
    NDC, DRUG_NAME, Procedure_Code, RC_DESC,
    BILL_UNITS, PKG_SIZE, UOM,
    File_Date, DLU
FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
ORDER BY DLU DESC;

PRINT '';
PRINT '============================================================';
PRINT 'VALIDATION COMPLETE!';
PRINT '============================================================';
```

## @arunknc0211-art

but i have 2 concerns

1 regarding log table 
USE [DW_Reference]
GO

/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log]    Script Date: 1/24/2026 8:21:49 PM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log](
	[Log_ID] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[File_Date] [date] NOT NULL,
	[Process_Date] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL,
	[Record_Key] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[NDC] [varchar](11) NULL,
	[Procedure_Code] [varchar](5) NULL,
	[Effective_Date] [date] NULL,
	[Log_Type] [varchar](20) NOT NULL,
	[Error_Code] [varchar](20) NULL,
	[Message] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Action_Taken] [varchar](50) NULL,
	[Created_Date] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL,
 CONSTRAINT [PK_NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
(
	[Log_ID] ASC
)WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON, OPTIMIZE_FOR_SEQUENTIAL_KEY = OFF) ON [PRIMARY]
) ON [PRIMARY]
GO

ALTER TABLE [dbo].[NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log] ADD  DEFAULT (getdate()) FOR [Process_Date]
GO

ALTER TABLE [dbo].[NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log] ADD  DEFAULT (getdate()) FOR [Created_Date]

## Copilot

**Excellent questions! You're absolutely right on all points. Let me address each concern and provide optimized scripts.**

---

## **📋 ANSWERS TO YOUR CONCERNS**

### **LOG TABLE CONCERNS:**

**1. Process_Date vs Created_Date:**
- ✅ **You're right!** Both are redundant
- ✅ **Solution:** Remove `Process_Date`, keep only one timestamp column
- ✅ **Rename:** `Created_Date` → `Process_Date` (more meaningful name)

**2. DATETIME2 vs DATETIME:**
- `DATETIME2` has **higher precision** (100 nanoseconds vs 3.33 milliseconds)
- `DATETIME2` is **more accurate** and **SQL Server best practice** since 2008
- **Recommendation:** Keep `DATETIME2` but you can use `DATETIME` if you prefer simplicity

**3. Record_Key necessity:**
- ✅ **Not mandatory** - it's just a concatenated string for quick reference
- ✅ **Can remove** - NDC + Procedure_Code + Effective_Date already identifies the record
- **Recommendation:** Remove it to save space

**4. Add Ineffective_Date to log:**
- ✅ **Good idea!** Helpful for tracking what ineffective date was set/rejected
- **Recommendation:** Add it

---

### **MAIN TABLE CONCERNS:**

**1. Xwalk_ID necessity:**
- **NOT strictly necessary** - the UNIQUE constraint on (NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date) could be the primary key
- **BUT:** Identity columns are useful for:
  - Foreign key references (if other tables link to this)
  - Easier row identification in updates/deletes
  - Performance (clustered index on identity is fast for inserts)
- **Recommendation:** **Keep it** - it's a best practice for a surrogate key

**2. Column order (NDC, Proc, Name vs NDC, Name, Proc):**
- ✅ **You're absolutely right!**
- **Logical order:** NDC → Drug Name → Procedure Code → Description
- Groups related fields together (drug info, then procedure info)

---

## **🔧 OPTIMIZED TABLE SCRIPTS**

### **SCRIPT 1: OPTIMIZED LOG TABLE**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- OPTIMIZED LOG TABLE (Simplified)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

-- Drop existing log table
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    PRINT 'Dropping existing NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table...';
    DROP TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log;
END
GO

PRINT 'Creating optimized NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log table...';

CREATE TABLE dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
    -- Primary Key
    Log_ID INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- File and processing info
    File_Date DATE NOT NULL,
    Process_Date DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
    
    -- Record identification (no redundant Record_Key)
    NDC VARCHAR(11) NULL,
    Procedure_Code VARCHAR(5) NULL,
    Effective_Date DATE NULL,
    Ineffective_Date DATE NULL,  -- NEW: Track ineffective date too
    
    -- Log details
    Log_Type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    Error_Code VARCHAR(50) NULL,
    Message NVARCHAR(1000) NULL,
    Action_Taken VARCHAR(50) NULL,
    
    -- Constraints
    CONSTRAINT PK_NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED (Log_ID)
);

PRINT 'Optimized log table created successfully!';
PRINT '';

-- Verify structure
SELECT 
    ORDINAL_POSITION AS Col_Order,
    COLUMN_NAME,
    DATA_TYPE + 
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NOT NULL 
        THEN '(' + CAST(CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        ELSE ''
    END AS Data_Type,
    IS_NULLABLE,
    COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

GO
```

---

### **SCRIPT 2: OPTIMIZED MAIN TABLE (Better Column Order)**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- OPTIMIZED MAIN TABLE (Logical Column Order)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

-- Drop existing table
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    PRINT 'Dropping existing Procedure_NDC_Xwalk table...';
    DROP TABLE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
END
GO

PRINT 'Creating optimized Procedure_NDC_Xwalk table with logical column order...';

CREATE TABLE dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk (
    -- Primary Key (surrogate key - best practice)
    Xwalk_ID INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Drug information (grouped together)
    NDC VARCHAR(11) NOT NULL,
    DRUG_NAME VARCHAR(255) NULL,
    
    -- Procedure information (grouped together)
    Procedure_Code VARCHAR(5) NOT NULL,
    RC_DESC VARCHAR(512) NULL,
    NOC_Indicator CHAR(1) NULL,
    
    -- Date fields (business key fields)
    Effective_Date DATE NOT NULL,
    Ineffective_Date DATE NULL,
    
    -- Billing/Package information (grouped together)
    BILL_UNITS DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    PKG_SIZE DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
    PKG_QTY INT NULL,
    UOM VARCHAR(10) NULL,
    PKG_UOM VARCHAR(20) NULL,
    
    -- Audit fields (at the end)
    User_ID VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT (SUSER_SNAME()),
    File_Date DATE NULL,
    DLU DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETDATE()),
    
    -- Constraints
    CONSTRAINT PK_Procedure_NDC_Xwalk PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED (Xwalk_ID),
    CONSTRAINT UQ_NDC_Proc_EffDate UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date),
    CONSTRAINT CK_NOC CHECK (NOC_Indicator IS NULL OR NOC_Indicator = 'Y')
);

PRINT 'Optimized main table created successfully!';
PRINT '';

-- Verify structure
SELECT 
    ORDINAL_POSITION AS Col_Order,
    COLUMN_NAME,
    DATA_TYPE + 
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NOT NULL 
        THEN '(' + CAST(CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        WHEN NUMERIC_PRECISION IS NOT NULL
        THEN '(' + CAST(NUMERIC_PRECISION AS VARCHAR) + ',' + CAST(NUMERIC_SCALE AS VARCHAR) + ')'
        ELSE ''
    END AS Data_Type,
    IS_NULLABLE,
    COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Procedure_NDC_Xwalk'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

GO
```

---

### **SCRIPT 3: UPDATED STORED PROCEDURE (Works with Optimized Tables)**

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- UPDATED STORED PROCEDURE (Optimized for new table structure)
-- ============================================================

USE DW_Reference;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_Process_NDC_Xwalk
    @FileDate DATE
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2 = GETDATE();
    DECLARE @TotalRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @ExcludedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @UpdatedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @RejectedRecords INT = 0;
    DECLARE @WarningRecords INT = 0;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        
        PRINT '============================================================';
        PRINT 'NDC CROSSWALK PROCESSING';
        PRINT 'File Date: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @FileDate, 23);
        PRINT 'Start Time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @StartTime, 120);
        PRINT '============================================================';
        
        -- Count total records
        SELECT @TotalRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate;
        
        PRINT 'Total records in file: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Count excluded records
        SELECT @ExcludedRecords = COUNT(*)
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate
            AND RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL
            AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> ''
            AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < '2014-01-01';
        
        PRINT 'Excluded records (RMV_DATE < 2014-01-01): ' + CAST(@ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Records to process: ' + CAST(@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        IF (@TotalRecords - @ExcludedRecords) = 0
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'WARNING: No records to process after exclusions';
            RETURN;
        END
        
        -- Create temp working table
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WorkingData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WorkingData;
        
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) AS NDC,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(DRUG_NAME)) AS DRUG_NAME,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) AS Procedure_Code,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(RC_DESC)) AS RC_DESC,
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS NOC_Indicator,
            TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) AS Effective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = '' THEN NULL
                ELSE TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101)
            END AS Ineffective_Date,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS,
            CASE 
                WHEN BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_SIZE IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_SIZE) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_SIZE AS DECIMAL(12,6))
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_SIZE,
            CASE 
                WHEN PKG_QTY IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(PKG_QTY) = 1 
                THEN TRY_CAST(PKG_QTY AS INT)
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS PKG_QTY,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(UOM)) AS UOM,
            LTRIM(RTRIM(PKG_UOM)) AS PKG_UOM,
            File_Date,
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN NDC IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC))) <> 11 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(NDC)) LIKE '%[^0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 01: NDC INVALID FORMAT (non-numeric)'
                WHEN REIMB_CODE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE MISSING'
                WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE))) <> 5 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (length)'
                WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(REIMB_CODE)) LIKE '%[^A-Z0-9]%' 
                    THEN 'Reject 02: PROCEDURE CODE INVALID FORMAT (alphanumeric)'
                WHEN IS_NOC IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC)) <> '' 
                    AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(IS_NOC))) <> 'Y' 
                    THEN 'Reject 03: NOC INDICATOR UNKNOWN VALUE'
                WHEN ADD_DATE IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ADD_DATE)) = '' 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE MISSING'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 04: EFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                WHEN RMV_DATE IS NOT NULL 
                    AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) <> '' 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL 
                    THEN 'Reject 05: INEFFECTIVE DATE INVALID FORMAT'
                WHEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL 
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101) IS NOT NULL
                    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) < TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ADD_DATE, 101)
                    THEN 'Reject 06: INEFFECTIVE DATE BEFORE EFFECTIVE DATE'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS NVARCHAR(500)) AS Validation_Error,
            0 AS Is_Processed
        INTO #WorkingData
        FROM dbo.RJHealth_Drug_Data
        WHERE File_Date = @FileDate
            AND (
                RMV_DATE IS NULL 
                OR LTRIM(RTRIM(RMV_DATE)) = ''
                OR TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) IS NULL
                OR TRY_CONVERT(DATE, RMV_DATE, 101) >= '2014-01-01'
            );
        
        DECLARE @WorkingCount INT = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #WorkingData);
        PRINT 'Working data loaded: ' + CAST(@WorkingCount AS VARCHAR) + ' records';
        
        -- Field validation errors (UPDATED: No Record_Key, added Ineffective_Date)
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
            File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
            Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
        )
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date,  -- NEW
            'ERROR',
            LEFT(Validation_Error, CHARINDEX(':', Validation_Error) - 1),
            Validation_Error,
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        SET @RejectedRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Field validation errors: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Check for duplicates
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
            File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
            Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
        )
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 11',
            'DUPLICATE RECORDS: Key appears ' + CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) + ' times',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
        GROUP BY NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 11: DUPLICATE RECORDS'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM #WorkingData w2
                WHERE w2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND w2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND w2.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
                    AND w2.Validation_Error IS NULL
                GROUP BY w2.NDC, w2.Procedure_Code, w2.Effective_Date
                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
            );
        
        -- Projected state for overlap check
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ProjectedProduction') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ProjectedProduction;
        
        SELECT 
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date
        INTO #ProjectedProduction
        FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk;
        
        UPDATE proj
        SET proj.Ineffective_Date = w.Ineffective_Date
        FROM #ProjectedProduction proj
        INNER JOIN #WorkingData w ON
            proj.NDC = w.NDC
            AND proj.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
            AND proj.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL;
        
        -- Check overlaps
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
            File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
            Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
        )
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            w.Ineffective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'Reject 13/14',
            'OVERLAP: New (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ') overlaps existing (' +
                CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ' to ' + 
                ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Ineffective_Date, 23), 'open') + ')',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ProjectedProduction p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
            AND w.Effective_Date <> p.Effective_Date
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND (
                (w.Effective_Date >= p.Effective_Date 
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL 
                    AND w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (p.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p.Ineffective_Date))
                OR
                (w.Effective_Date <= p.Effective_Date
                    AND (w.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date >= p.Effective_Date))
            );
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'Reject 13/14: OVERLAP'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log log
                WHERE log.File_Date = @FileDate
                    AND log.Error_Code = 'Reject 13/14'
                    AND log.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND log.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND log.Effective_Date = w.Effective_Date
            );
        
        -- Group Rejection
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ErrorGroups') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ErrorGroups;
        
        SELECT DISTINCT NDC, Procedure_Code
        INTO #ErrorGroups
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error IS NOT NULL;
        
        UPDATE w
        SET Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN #ErrorGroups eg ON w.NDC = eg.NDC AND w.Procedure_Code = eg.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL;
        
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
            File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
            Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
        )
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            NDC,
            Procedure_Code,
            Effective_Date,
            Ineffective_Date,
            'ERROR',
            'GROUP_REJECTION',
            'Rejected due to group rejection rule (Rule 5)',
            'REJECTED'
        FROM #WorkingData
        WHERE Validation_Error = 'GROUP_REJECTION';
        
        DECLARE @GroupRejected INT = @@ROWCOUNT;
        SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + @GroupRejected;
        
        PRINT 'Group rejection additional errors: ' + CAST(@GroupRejected AS VARCHAR);
        PRINT 'Total rejected records: ' + CAST(@RejectedRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Warning 15
        INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
            File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
            Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
        )
        SELECT 
            @FileDate,
            w.NDC,
            w.Procedure_Code,
            w.Effective_Date,
            w.Ineffective_Date,
            'WARNING',
            'Warning 15',
            'RETRO RECORD: Ineffective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, w.Ineffective_Date, 23) + 
                ') earlier than existing effective date (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, p.Effective_Date, 23) + ')',
            'WILL_INSERT'
        FROM #WorkingData w
        INNER JOIN dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p ON
            w.NDC = p.NDC
            AND w.Procedure_Code = p.Procedure_Code
        WHERE w.Validation_Error IS NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date IS NOT NULL
            AND w.Ineffective_Date < p.Effective_Date
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk p2
                WHERE p2.NDC = w.NDC
                    AND p2.Procedure_Code = w.Procedure_Code
                    AND (
                        (w.Effective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date 
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Effective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                        OR
                        (w.Ineffective_Date >= p2.Effective_Date
                            AND (p2.Ineffective_Date IS NULL OR w.Ineffective_Date <= p2.Ineffective_Date))
                    )
            );
        
        SET @WarningRecords = @@ROWCOUNT;
        PRINT 'Warnings detected: ' + CAST(@WarningRecords AS VARCHAR);
        
        -- Process Valid Records
        PRINT 'Processing valid records...';
        
        DECLARE @NDC VARCHAR(11), @ProcCode VARCHAR(5), @NOC CHAR(1);
        DECLARE @DrugName VARCHAR(255), @RCDesc VARCHAR(512);
        DECLARE @EffDate DATE, @IneffDate DATE;
        DECLARE @BillUnits DECIMAL(12,6), @BillUnitsPkg DECIMAL(12,6);
        DECLARE @PkgSize DECIMAL(12,6), @PkgQty INT;
        DECLARE @UOM VARCHAR(10), @PkgUOM VARCHAR(20);
        DECLARE @FileDate_Value DATE;
        DECLARE @ExistingIneff DATE;
        
        DECLARE process_cursor CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
            SELECT 
                NDC, DRUG_NAME, Procedure_Code, RC_DESC, NOC_Indicator, 
                Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
                BILL_UNITS, BILL_UNITS_PER_PKG, PKG_SIZE, PKG_QTY,
                UOM, PKG_UOM, File_Date
            FROM #WorkingData
            WHERE Validation_Error IS NULL
            ORDER BY Procedure_Code, NDC, Effective_Date;
        
        OPEN process_cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO 
            @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
            @EffDate, @IneffDate,
            @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
            @UOM, @PkgUOM, @FileDate_Value;
        
        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            
            SET @ExistingIneff = NULL;
            
            SELECT @ExistingIneff = Ineffective_Date
            FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk
            WHERE NDC = @NDC
                AND Procedure_Code = @ProcCode
                AND Effective_Date = @EffDate;
            
            IF @ExistingIneff IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate IS NOT NULL 
                AND @IneffDate <> @ExistingIneff
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO dbo.NDC_Xwalk_Process_Log (
                    File_Date, NDC, Procedure_Code, Effective_Date, Ineffective_Date,
                    Log_Type, Error_Code, Message, Action_Taken
                )
                VALUES (
                    @FileDate, 
                    @NDC, 
                    @ProcCode, 
                    @EffDate, 
                    @IneffDate,
                    'ERROR', 
                    'CLOSED_RECORD',
                    'ATTEMPT TO UPDATE CLOSED RECORD: Existing Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @ExistingIneff, 23) + 
                    ', New Ineff=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @IneffDate, 23),
                    'REJECTED'
                );
                
                SET @RejectedRecords = @RejectedRecords + 1;
                FETCH NEXT FROM process_cursor INTO 
                    @NDC, @DrugName, @ProcCode, @RCDesc, @NOC, 
                    @EffDate, @IneffDate,
                    @BillUnits, @BillUnitsPkg, @PkgSize, @PkgQty,
                    @UOM, @PkgUOM, @FileDate_Value;
                CONTINUE;
            END
            
            IF EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM dbo.Procedure_NDC_Xwalk 
                WHERE NDC = @ND

## @arunknc0211-art

and in procedirendc table also

## Copilot

**You're absolutely right! I apologize. Let me fix it properly this time.**
